findings.description: RST-specific markup (`:java:extdoc:`) was not stripped and remains in the knowledge file content: "`connectionFactory` プロパティに :java:extdoc:`ConnectionFactory <nablarch.core.db.connection.ConnectionFactory>` 実装クラスを設定してDB接続を取得する。" — this raw RST role syntax will render as literal text when consumed by an AI agent.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST role: `:java:extdoc:`ConnectionFactory <nablarch.core.db.connection.ConnectionFactory>`` which should be converted to plain text such as `ConnectionFactory (nablarch.core.db.connection.ConnectionFactory)` in the knowledge file.
